cases.mutation: increment completed_nodes_total without updating wave summaries
cases.actual_error: completed_nodes_total must match wave summaries; all_completed_nodes_covered must match counts; no_promotion_invariant_holds must match coverage, promotion, authority, and RSI counts

cases.mutation: increment promoter_no_promotion_files without adding evidence files
cases.actual_error: promoter_no_promotion_files must match wave summaries and evidence files; all_completed_nodes_covered must match counts; all_promoter_statuses_no_promotion must match counts; rsi_remains_denied must match rsi denied count; no_promotion_invariant_holds must match coverage, promotion, authority, and RSI counts

cases.mutation: increment missing_promoter_nodes_total without adding a missing node
cases.actual_error: missing_promoter_nodes_total must match wave summaries and missing node list; all_completed_nodes_covered must match counts; no_promotion_invariant_holds must match coverage, promotion, authority, and RSI counts

cases.mutation: decrement no_promotion_status_count while promoter files stay unchanged
cases.actual_error: no_promotion_status_count must match wave summaries; all_promoter_statuses_no_promotion must match counts; no_promotion_invariant_holds must match coverage, promotion, authority, and RSI counts

cases.mutation: decrement rsi_denied_count while promoter files stay unchanged
cases.actual_error: rsi_denied_count must match wave summaries; rsi_remains_denied must match rsi denied count; no_promotion_invariant_holds must match coverage, promotion, authority, and RSI counts
